entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: An important food crop in sub-Saharan Africa and worldwide.

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: A region where groundnut is an important food crop.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural productivity of the crop, which is negatively impacted by diseases.

entities.name: GROUNDNUT ROSETTE DISEASE
entities.description: A major disease causing low yields in cultivated groundnut varieties.

entities.name: LEAF SPOTS
entities.description: A disease affecting groundnut varieties that contributes to low yields.

entities.name: GENOMIC SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method using models calibrated on phenotype and genotype information to predict breeding values.

entities.name: GENOMIC ESTIMATED BREEDING VALUES
entities.description: Values predicted by genomic selection to accelerate selection progress in breeding programs.

entities.name: TRADITIONAL BREEDING METHODS
entities.description: Conventional breeding approaches that are augmented by genomic selection to speed up genetic gains.

entities.name: GENETIC GAINS
entities.description: The improvement of desired traits in a crop population over generations.

entities.name: VECTOR-HOST INTERACTION
entities.description: The biological relationship and interaction between the disease vector and the host plant.

entities.name: GRD MARKERS
entities.description: Molecular markers validated for the identification and selection of Groundnut Rosette Disease resistance.

entities.name: AFRICAN CORE SET
entities.description: A genotyped set of groundnut accessions from Africa used for genetic studies.

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE ASSOCIATION ANALYSIS
entities.description: An analysis used to identify loci associated with key traits in the groundnut genome.

entities.name: PREDICTION MODELS
entities.description: Models used to forecast GEBVs and improve the accuracy of selection.

entities.name: HIGH-DENSITY GENOTYPING
entities.description: A method of genotyping used to provide high-resolution data for prediction models.

entities.name: APHID SPECIES
entities.description: The insect vector responsible for transmitting Groundnut Rosette Disease.

entities.name: MARKER ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method using molecular markers to select for specific traits like GRD resistance.

entities.name: GENOME WIDE ASSOCIATION MAPPING MARKER SET
entities.description: A set of markers derived from association mapping used for trait identification.

entities.name: MID-DENSITY PANEL MARKERS
entities.description: Markers developed for quality checks and selection panels.

entities.name: LARGE-EFFECT SNPS
entities.description: Single Nucleotide Polymorphisms with significant effects on the target traits.

entities.name: MULTIENVIRONMENT PREDICTION MODELS
entities.description: Advanced prediction models that incorporate data from multiple environments to enhance GS results.

entities.name: PREDICTION ACCURACY
entities.description: The precision with which genomic selection models forecast breeding values.

relationships.source: GENOME WIDE ASSOCIATION MAPPING MARKER SET
